title: Add image-based language games for community use
notes: Suggestion #3 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-09). Add image-based language games, with Kok Kaper Indigenous community work as the immediate use case and a target of having the initial version stable before Sophie's next visit in early June 2026. Start with image-based flashcards in both directions: (1) show an image and ask the learner to choose the matching word from alternatives; (2) show a word and ask the learner to choose the matching image from alternatives. Reuse existing project image/page or picture-dictionary assets where possible, generate plausible distractors from the same project/language material, and provide a simple learner-facing play mode suitable for community review sessions.
